behavior_summary: U8P_LITHOS::look (Event 0) responds to a player 'look' action by setting inspector info/exclusion flags for the target instance and making that instance 'bark' the short identification string "Earth Titan", then returning immediately. This is a pure presentation/inspection handler.

U8P_LITHOS::use (Event 1) implements a long, gated interaction/cutscene: it checks the item's map id (skips the main sequence on a specific map), starts music, puts the avatar in stasis, spawns many helper visual/effect/process scripts, clears combat state on numerous NPC indices so the scene is uninterrupted, runs many dialog lines and animations (including camera quake effects and item frame animations), uses randomness for varied timings, and at the end writes the global flag lithosMet = 1 to record quest progression.

Helpers U8P_LITHOS::09B2 and U8P_LITHOS::0A14 animate item frames while coordinating camera quakes and small timed waits; multiple other short helpers are spawned to orchestrate parallel visual/timing elements during the cutscene.
notable_control_flow: The main interactive sequence in U8P_LITHOS::use is gated by Npc::getMap() — if the item is on a particular map id (inferred as 0x1F) the heavy cutscene is skipped and the function exits earlier (confidence: high).

U8P_LITHOS::use performs many parallel spawns (spawn of FREE::*/METHOD::* helpers and other small LITHOS helpers) so the cutscene is orchestrated by multiple concurrent processes rather than a single linear script (confidence: high).
Camera::startQuake/stopQuake are used around frame animation loops (U8P_LITHOS::09B2) to synchronize quake effects with item frame changes (confidence: high).
The function freezes player control via setAvatarInStasis at the start and releases later; scene end sets global lithosMet = 1 to record that the event occurred (confidence: high).
open_questions: Exact map id(s) that gate/skips the main cutscene in U8P_LITHOS::use beyond the inferred 0x1F — the canonical numeric value is observed but the gameplay intent/context for that map is not fully described (confidence: medium).

Precise dialog text and full dialog order used in the cutscene (the scout facts list many barks but not full strings or branching conditions) — some lines are inferred from bark calls (confidence: medium).

Detailed roles of the many spawned helpers (e.g., labeled helpers 0D3C, 0D7C, 0DAC, 0DDC) beyond their general purpose of timing/visual effects — exact effect assets and timings remain un-documented here (confidence: low).

main_function.name: U8P_LITHOS::look (Event 0)
main_function.purpose: Provide a quick in-world description when a player examines the Lithos instance: set inspector/processing flags and make the item speak the short identifier string "Earth Titan".
entry_conditions: Triggered when the player/avatar performs the 'look' (examine) action on the Lithos instance.
Runs as a short reaction; no long-running or branching behavior in this handler.

function_map.name: U8P_LITHOS::look (Event 0)
function_map.role: Inspection/display handler that barks the item name and sets inspection/process exclusion flags.

function_map.name: U8P_LITHOS::use (Event 1)
function_map.role: Primary interaction/cutscene handler that orchestrates music, stasis, animations, dialog, camera shakes, NPC state clearing, and sets quest flag lithosMet on completion.

function_map.name: U8P_LITHOS::09B2
function_map.role: Anim/quake helper: starts camera quake, steps item frames in a loop up to a limit, then stops quake.

function_map.name: U8P_LITHOS::0A14
function_map.role: Short frame-step helper: advance frames across a small range with waits/spawns between steps.

function_map.name: U8P_LITHOS::0D3C
function_map.role: Spawned sub-behavior used by the cutscene for timing/visual effects (inferred purpose).

function_map.name: U8P_LITHOS::0D7C
function_map.role: Spawned sub-behavior used by the cutscene for timing/visual effects (inferred purpose).

function_map.name: U8P_LITHOS::0DAC
function_map.role: Spawned sub-behavior used by the cutscene for timing/visual effects (inferred purpose).

internal_calls.purpose: Animate item frames while surrounding the animation with camera quake effects; used to emphasize visual beats in the cutscene.
Advance a short frame sequence with timed waits; used for small percussive animations in the scene.
Spawned to run concurrent timing/visual work in parallel with the main script (exact effects inferred).

external_calls.purpose: Display the short identifying string "Earth Titan" to the player who examined the item.
Obtain the item's/current NPC map id to decide whether to execute the full cutscene or skip (scene gating).
Start background music for the cutscene.
Freeze player input/movement for the duration of the cutscene.
Launch many parallel helper scripts/processes (visuals, waits, free timers, small helpers like 09B2/0A14) to orchestrate the scene.
Clear combat flags on many NPC indices so the cutscene is not interrupted by combat behavior.
Start and stop camera quake effects around the frame-animation loop.
Change the Lithos/item display frame as part of visual animation sequences.
Provide randomized timing values to vary delays and make the sequence feel less deterministic.

writes.name: lithosMet
writes.likely_effect: Mark that the Lithos interaction / meeting / cutscene has occurred (quest progression flag); set to 1 near the end of U8P_LITHOS::use.

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: U8P_LITHOS::look (Event 0) responds to a player 'look' action by setting inspector info/exclusion flags for the target instance and making that instance 'bark' the short identification string "Earth Titan", then returning immediately. This is a pure presentation/inspection handler.
